title: [MTR/NTE] mBus
body:
Buses (and trolleybuses) for MTR/NTE

It is required to have MTR 3, NTE 0.5.2 and Harry's Lib installed.

By default, the main branch will be downloaded. Please visit version page for more buses.

The resourcepack adds detailed bus models from Eastern Europe and especially Post-Soviet states.

The resourcepack features products from companies such as:

  • MAZ
  • LiAZ
  • NefAZ
  • BKM
  • Scania
  • Mercedes
  • and many more....

Pack also has Trolleybus Wires as rails model and a Moscow PIDS template for Joban Client Mod HK PIDS (unfortunately quite unifinished)

Some models intended for this pack (such as SVARZ, BKM, TrolZa trolleybuses and MAZ 203.047) are available on International TransportPack.

Special thanks to Oleg Faktor for BKM model. vk.com/of_workshop_public

Special thanks to Altezzxs for mBus idea. modrinth.com/user/Altezzxs

And special thanks to MURS-MC server. murs-mc.ru

Previous versions can be found on rumtr.miraheze.org/wiki/RuBus

Don't be surprised if new versions don't come out for a long time.
